Item Name: Organic Way Dandelion Leaf (Taraxacum Officinale) Cut & Sifted - Herbal Tea | European Wild-Harvest | Kosher & USDA Certified | Vegan, Non-GMO & Gluten Free | 100% Raw from Albania (1/2LBS / 8Oz.) Bullet Point 1: Premium Quality Dandelion Leaf – Our cut & sifted dandelion leaf is carefully selected and processed to ensure a clean and consistent product. Sourced from trusted suppliers, it is perfect for various uses, whether in teas, infusions, or other creative applications. Enjoy the fresh, earthy aroma and natural green color of this versatile botanical ingredient. Bullet Point 2: Versatile Ingredient – This cut & sifted dandelion leaf is a great addition to your pantry. Ideal for brewing into a warm infusion, incorporating into culinary creations, or blending with other herbs, it offers multiple ways to enjoy its natural properties. Use it in homemade herbal mixes or as a unique ingredient in your favorite recipes. Bullet Point 3: Carefully Processed & Packaged – Our dandelion leaf is thoroughly cut and sifted to remove unwanted particles, ensuring a high-quality product. It is securely packaged to maintain freshness and preserve its natural characteristics. Each batch undergoes careful handling to provide a product that meets high-quality standards. Bullet Point 4: Sustainably Sourced & Naturally Dried – We take care in selecting our dandelion leaves from reliable sources that follow responsible harvesting practices. The leaves are naturally dried to maintain their original aroma, texture, and color, making them a great choice for those who appreciate high-quality botanical ingredients. Bullet Point 5: Resealable Packaging for Freshness – Our dandelion leaf comes in a convenient, resealable bag to keep it fresh for longer. The secure closure helps retain its natural aroma and texture, ensuring you get the best experience with every use. Store it in a cool, dry place to maintain its quality over time. Product Description:

Dandelion Leaves are known for their aroma. They are used in tea and other beverages and also sometimes in desserts and ice-cream. Our cut and sifted dandelion contains no air-drying or additives. They can we used in food item and also as a supplement for regulating the digestive system.

Our cut and sifted dandelion leaf means that the leaves aren't sold in whole form, but rather "cut" into smaller pieces and then "sifted" to remove the small pieces and dust that result from the cutting process.

Value: 8.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic dandelion leaf positioned as a high-quality, specialty herb with explicit certifications (USDA Organic, Kosher) and a focus on clean, additive-free processing. The 8 oz size and premium claims (natural, non-GMO, gluten-free) suggest a target demographic of health-oriented adults willing to pay for organic, ethically sourced botanicals.
